nasb.text: The king of Israel replied, “It is according to your word, my lord, O king; I am yours, and all that I have.”

esv.text: And the king of Israel answered, “As you say, my lord, O king, I am yours, and all that I have.”

cnv.text: 以色列王回答說：“我主我王啊，就照著你所說的，我和我所有的一切都可以歸你。”

ccb.text: 以色列王说：“我主我王啊，我答应你的要求，我和我的一切都是你的。”
